paper_title: REVEALS Model and Fossil Pollen Records Analysis

methods.description: This method involves using the REVEALS function within the LRA R-package to produce grid-based REVEALS estimates (Gb-RVest) for pollen data. It applies different deposition models based on site type and combines results from lakes and bogs to produce a single mean estimate and its standard error for each taxon.

steps.description: Select the Gaussian Plume model to describe pollen dispersal.
steps.searchable_summary: select Gaussian Plume model for pollen dispersal

steps.description: Apply REVEALS separately for lake and bog data and combine results.
steps.searchable_summary: apply REVEALS for lake and bog data separately and combine results

steps.description: Assume neutral atmospheric conditions and wind speed of 3 m.s−1.
steps.searchable_summary: set atmospheric conditions and wind speed for REVEALS

steps.description: Set Zmax to 50 km, corresponding to a 1° × 1° grid cell.
steps.searchable_summary: set Zmax to 50 km for REVEALS

steps.description: Extract REVEALS results by time window, producing matrices of mean Gb-RVest and SEs.
steps.searchable_summary: extract REVEALS results by time window

steps.description: Group taxon-based Gb-RVest into land-cover types (LCTs).
Calculate SEs of each Gb-RVest-LCT and overall tree cover using the delta method.
Use major axis regression to explore bivariate relationships between variables.
Compare pairs of Gb-RVest-LCTs for all time windows by calculating differences.

methods.method_name: Fossil Pollen Records: Data Compilation and Preparation
methods.description: This method involves compiling and preparing fossil pollen records from various sources across Europe, ensuring data quality and consistency for use in the REVEALS model.

steps.searchable_summary: compile pollen records from multiple countries

steps.description: Filter pollen records based on basin type and chronological control.
steps.searchable_summary: filter pollen records by basin type and chronology

steps.description: Aggregate pollen counts into 25 time windows across the Holocene.
steps.searchable_summary: aggregate pollen counts into time windows

steps.description: Harmonize taxonomy of pollen data files.
Filter pollen records to remove time windows with fewer than 100 pollen grains.
steps.searchable_summary: filter pollen records by pollen grain count

steps.description: Test inclusion/exclusion of plant taxa with dominant entomophily on REVEALS estimates.
steps.searchable_summary: test effect of entomophilous taxa on REVEALS
